hot_lead.description: Score 8-10. Fast, direct, get them on a call.

steps.action: Call immediately. If no answer, leave voicemail + WhatsApp.
Send property package with personalized note referencing their interest.
Short follow-up: 'Sent you the property details yesterday — any questions I can answer?'
Share one specific detail that matches their interest (lot availability, ROI projection, etc.)
Second call attempt. If no response after this, move to warm sequence.

warm_lead.description: Score 5-7. Nurture with value, don't push.

steps.action: Send property package with brief personalized intro.
Share a relevant update: new drone footage, infrastructure progress, lots sold this week.
Light touch: 'Hi [name], just checking if you had a chance to look at the property info?'
Inventory update: how many lots remain, any price changes.
Social proof: mention number of inquiries, lots reserved, investor interest.
Final check-in. Low pressure. 'No rush — just wanted to make sure you have everything you need.'
Thank them for their interest. Send a brief overview, not the full package.
Development update: progress, timeline, community news.
Market context: why this area, appreciation trends, investment case.
Re-engagement: 'Still thinking about [location]? Here's what's changed since we last talked.'
